about: This configurator will help you to configure your ESP3D 3.0 for a list of features that fit your needs, and be sure it will compile properly.
Some features share the same GPIO. This: Some features share the same GPIO. This includes Default (-1) pins resolved for your MCU.
Firmware downloads are disabled until ea: Firmware downloads are disabled until each GPIO is used by only one visible feature. Default (-1) pins are resolved for your MCU.
